description_long: This is a sandwich served on a round, dark plate. The sandwich features a soft, lightly browned bun that is split horizontally and filled with a generous portion of sliced beef, melted cheese, and visible green peppers. The filling is slightly overflowing from the sides, giving it a hearty and appetizing appearance. The bread has a smooth, matte finish, while the interior ingredients appear moist and textured. The plate is simple and unadorned, providing a neutral backdrop that highlights the sandwich. No packaging, branding, or additional garnishes are visible in the scene.
description: A hearty sandwich with sliced beef, melted cheese, and green peppers in a soft bun, served on a plain dark plate.
description_view_0: The sandwich is seen from a slight angle, showing the rounded top of the bun and a glimpse of the filling peeking out from the side.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the full length of the sandwich, with the beef, cheese, and green peppers clearly visible between the bun halves.
description_view_2: The sandwich is viewed from the opposite end, showing the back of the bun and a small amount of filling visible at the edge.
description_view_3: The sandwich is seen from the underside, mostly showing the bottom of the bun with little filling visible.
